description: HVAC system making strange noise. Not cooling properly.

expected.clarify_answer: The noise is a loud rattling coming from the outdoor unit. It started about 2 days ago.

expected_claims.note: tests/fixtures/test_hvac_manual.pdf (doc_id=test-hvac-manual) covers rattling outdoor unit -> loose compressor mount bolts CM-450-BK; claims should ground against it in --live. Reported, not run-blocking.

expected_evidence.note: Condenser chapter (p0) and troubleshooting (p2) both cover the rattling-outdoor-unit fault — requires --live retrieval with the fixture ingested
